NASN Automotive Electronics (Zhejiang) Co., Ltd. (formerly Shanghai NASN Automotive Electronics) is a prominent, venture-backed Tier-1 supplier specializing in chassis wire-by-wire technologies. Its USCC (91310114) indicates an original registration in Jiading District, Shanghai. The company has since relocated its headquarters/major operations to Xiaoshan District, Hangzhou (Zhejiang), a strategic move likely driven by government incentives, space for mass production, and proximity to major EV manufacturers. Operating as an unlisted joint-stock company with Hong Kong/Macao/Taiwan investment, its highly precise registered capital (~33.58M RMB) suggests it has undergone multiple rounds of institutional funding. With 139 insured employees and a strong focus on autonomous driving chassis components (e.g., electronic brake boosters, steering systems), NASN is an active, highly capitalized player in the smart EV supply chain.
